title: Fussy Azaleas
description: Azalea bushes only generate from bone-mealed moss in specific biomes.
body:
## Overview

This is an incredibly niche mod with one feature: azalea bushes do not spawn from bone-mealed moss blocks, unless the bone-mealing takes place in a certain biome tag.

This mod came about because I wanted to use moss in worldgen without having it guarantee access to azalea trees. While less significant in vanilla, azalea trees get a specialized wood type with mods such as [Caverns and Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms), adding further value to their discovery. Thus, I wanted to let the Lush Caves retain that value while keeping moss flexible.


## Config

While there is no config, you can edit the biome tag `fussy_azaleas:moss_grows_azaleas` to add more biomes where azaleas should be available. By default, this only includes vanilla's Lush Caves.

---
Requires [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint). Feel free to direct any compat suggestions and bugs to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/fussyazaleas/issues)!
